created_at.description: The date and time when the inference profile was created.

description.description: A brief summary or explanation of the inference profile.

inference_profile_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) uniquely identifying the inference profile.

inference_profile_name.description: The name assigned to the inference profile.

models.description: A list of models associated with the inference profile, each identified by their ARN.

status.description: The current status of the inference profile, indicating its state or condition.

updated_at.description: The date and time when the inference profile was last updated.
